channel.title: C/C++ on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in C/C++ on yexca'Blog

item.title: Setting Up C Environment in VS Code
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview This article was written by Hiyoung Original article: https://blog.hiyoung.icu/2022/12/15/997871bc263d/ VS Code is just a plain text editor, not an IDE (Integrated Development Environment). It doesn’t include a compiler or many other features, so you need to install the compiler yourself. Step 1: Download the software from the VS Code official website: Visual Studio Code – Code Editing. Redefined Step 2: We need to …
